steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ANALYSIS_START_PERIOD_DATE, ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE BETWEEN '2023-12-31' AND '2024-12-31' ORDER BY ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND REPORT_DATE = '2024-12-31';"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Renova Energia (Dec 2024)
from decimal import Decimal
shares = 249483956
price = 2.60
# Balance and income values (from dataset)
ativo = 3061346000.0
disponibilidades = 144216000.0 + 5145000.0  # caixa + aplicacoes
ativo_circulante = 288269000.0
caixa = 144216000.0
aplicacoes = 5145000.0
passivo_circulante = 362642000.0
patrimonio = 815951000.0
# Debt
emprestimos_curto = 33691000.0
emprestimos_longo = 1110499000.0
div_bruta = emprestimos_curto + emprestimos_longo
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
# Income
receita_12 = 259226000.0  # 3.01 annual
ebit_12 = 16816000.0  # 3.05 annual
lucro_12 = -117069000.0  # 3.11 annual
# 9-month cum
receita_9m = 167885000.0
ebit_9m = 64231000.0
lucro_9m = -49420000.0
# 3-month (Q4) = annual - 9m
receita_3m = receita_12 - receita_9m
ebit_3m = ebit_12 - ebit_9m
lucro_3m = lucro_12 - lucro_9m
# Depreciation (absolute)
dep_amort = 98148000.0  # absolute value from negative in dataset
# EBITDA
ebitda_12 = ebit_12 + dep_amort
# Market cap and EV
market_cap = price * shares
ev = market_cap + div_liquida
# Per-share metrics
lpa = lucro_12 / shares
vpa = patrimonio / shares
ebit_per_share = ebit_12 / shares
receita_per_share = receita_12 / shares
ativos_per_share = ativo / shares
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares
ativ_circ_liq = cap_giro  # same interpretation
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares
# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa != 0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share != 0 else None
psr = price / receita_per_share if receita_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativos = price / ativos_per_share if ativos_per_share != 0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share != 0 else None
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_12 if ebitda_12 != 0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12 if ebit_12 != 0 else None
# Percent metrics
marg_bruta = ( ( (receita_12 - ( -290104000.0) ) ) )
# Wait: We should compute Marg Bruta = Resultado Bruto / Receita Líquida. Use dataset: Resultado Bruto (3.03) for year = -30,878,000 (from 3.03 annual) 
res_bruto = -30878000.0
marg_bruta = res_bruto / receita_12 * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_12 / receita_12 * 100
marg_liq = lucro_12 / receita_12 * 100
# EBIT/Ativo
ebit_ativo = ebit_12 / ativo * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
fornecedores = 65404000.0
roic = ebit_12 / (ativo - fornecedores - caixa) * 100
roe = lucro_12 / patrimonio * 100
# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio
# Giro Ativos = Receita Líquida / Ativo Total
giro_ativos = receita_12 / ativo

# Prepare outputs rounded
from math import isfinite

def fmt(x, nd=2):
    if x is None or (isinstance(x, float) and (x!=x)):
        return 'N/A'
    if isinstance(x, float):
        return round(x, nd)
    return x

results = {
    'Ativo': ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liquida,
    'Patrim. Líc': patrimonio,
    'Receita Ldquida (12 meses)': receita_12,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12,
    'Lucro Ldquido (12 meses)': lucro_12,
    'Receita Ldquida (3 meses)': receita_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro Ldquido (3 meses)': lucro_3m,
    'P/L': fmt(pl,4) if pl is not None else 'N/A',
    'P/VP': fmt(pvp,4) if pvp is not None else 'N/A',
    'P/EBIT': fmt(p_ebit,4) if p_ebit is not None else 'N/A',
    'PSR': fmt(psr,4) if psr is not None else 'N/A',
    'P/Ativos': fmt(p_ativos,6) if p_ativos is not None else 'N/A',
    'P/Cap. Giro': fmt(p_cap_giro,4) if p_cap_giro is not None else 'N/A',
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': fmt(p_ativ_circ_liq,4) if p_ativ_circ_liq is not None else 'N/A',
    'EV / EBITDA': fmt(ev_ebitda,4) if ev_ebitda is not None else 'N/A',
    'EV / EBIT': fmt(ev_ebit,4) if ev_ebit is not None else 'N/A',
    'LPA': fmt(lpa,6),
    'VPA': fmt(vpa,6),
    'Marg. Bruta': f"{marg_bruta:.2f} %",
    'Marg. EBIT': f"{marg_ebit:.2f} %",
    'Marg. Ldquida': f"{marg_liq:.2f} %",
    'EBIT / Ativo': f"{ebit_ativo:.2f} %",
    'ROIC': f"{roic:.2f} %",
    'ROE': f"{roe:.2f} %",
    'Liquidez Corr': fmt(liquidez_corr,4),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': fmt(divbr_patrim,4),
    'Giro Ativos': fmt(giro_ativos,6),
    'Market Cap': market_cap,
    'EV': ev,
    'EBITDA (12 months)': ebitda_12,
}

results
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
